g.text: ### Memory/Disk Implementation Details - **Header Size**: 24 Bytes (including pointer). - **Alignment**: 8-byte word aligned. - **Durability**: Must call `fsync()` on Term/Vote mutation before responding to RPC.

ol.li: Election Safety: At most one leader can be elected in a given term.
Leader Append-Only: A leader never overwrites or deletes entries in its log; it only appends.
Log Matching: If two logs contain an entry with same index/term, logs are identical through that index.
Leader Completeness: If log entry is committed, it exists in leaders of all higher terms.
State Machine Safety: If a server applied an entry at index, no other server applies different entry at that index.
